Black-throated Thrush
More info
eBird
(Turdus atrogularis)

  • 16/04/26 Mayshiel 1 (Ian Murray) "Well documented"
  • 16/04/26 B6355, Duns GB-Scotland 55.87388, -2.60603 1 (Liam Morrison) "Single bird that has been around for last couple of days - seen well in paddock"
  • 15/04/26 Mayshiel Farm 1 (Stuart Housden) "Twitched! Male bird seenby many observers."
  • 15/04/26 Mayshiel Farm 1 (Jon Curson) "Good views of the bird that has been present for a few days."
  • 15/04/26 B6355, Scotland, GB (55.874, -2.606) 1 (Matthew Silk) "Continuing male"
  • 13/04/26 B6355, Duns GB-Scotland 55.87371, -2.60614 1 (Shawn Waddoups) "As documented. With Andrew Richardson. Yellow bill, greyish black head/throat, brown back with darker primaries, lighter underparts."
  • 13/04/26 B6355, Scotland, GB (55.874, -2.606) 1 (James Moreland) "Photographed."
  • 13/04/26 B6355, Scotland, GB (55.874, -2.606) 1 (Lukasz Pulawski) "Photographed."
  • 13/04/26 B6355, Scotland, GB (55.874, -2.606) 1 (Jan Jacoby) "Photographed."
  • 13/04/26 B6355, Scotland, GB (55.874, -2.606) 1 (Oliver Leedham) "Well recorded, male on ground."
  • 13/04/26 B6355, Scotland, GB (55.874, -2.606) 1 (Alex Starace) "Well recorded, male on ground."
  • 13/04/26 B6355, Scotland, GB (55.874, -2.606) 1 (Tom Gale) "Well recorded, male on ground."
  • 13/04/26 B6355, Scotland, GB (55.874, -2.606) 1 (Josie Hewitt) "Well recorded, male on ground."
  • 13/04/26 Mayshiel Farm 1 (Duncan Wiseman) "Continuing bird - smaller than fieldfare, with brownish grey back, yellow bill, pale belly and black face & throat. With other thrushes in field north of farm entrance"
  • 13/04/26 B6355, Scotland, GB (55.873, -2.605) 1 (Andrew Stirrat) "Originally found yesterday. 2nd CY feeding in sheep field."
  • 13/04/26 Muirshiel 1 (Rosie Filipiak) "See photo"
  • 13/04/26 Maysheil 1 (David Kelly) "Male found yesterday. Solid black throat, plain brownish grey back and pale underparts. Slightly smaller and more slender than the Fieldfares."
